use_cases: Guide new users through product setup and configuration steps
Track and display onboarding task completion progress in a modal
Help users discover key features during initial product engagement
Show required setup steps with interactive checkbox completion
ai_summary: An onboarding checklist component that displays setup tasks and progress tracking within a modal dialog. Built with Radix UI Dialog primitives and styled with Tailwind CSS, featuring smooth open/close animations and interactive task completion. Helps guide users through product initialization with a clean, accessible interface following shadcn/ui design patterns.
